stories.headline: Man pleads guilty over death of four migrants
stories.description: A man pleads guilty to endangering others after an incident off the coast of France.

stories.headline: Herefordshire river will take decades to recover from 'vandalism'
stories.description: River Lugg damage will take a generation to recover, ecologist says.

stories.headline: BP chairman removed over 'serious' conduct concerns
stories.description: Senior independent director Amanda Blanc says the board has been "surprised and disappointed" to learn of the issues.

stories.headline: Israeli attacks on eastern Lebanon village kill at least 12 people
stories.description: Attacks hit the village of Mashghara in the Bekaa Valley late Monday as Israel intensified its assault across Lebanon.

stories.headline: Peter Murrell sentence: How long could former SNP chief executive spend in prison?
stories.description: A hefty custodial sentence is almost certain after the former SNP chief executive embezzled £400,000 from the party.
